failures.description: The catalog dependency timed out during ProductCatalogSearch, leaving the agent without the tool evidence required to answer the price question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to get the price of item 1096508426. The agent followed the correct plan through index 2 by preparing the required ProductCatalogSearch call with item_id 1096508426 and product_id 1808611083. At index 3, the tool call failed with an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, message 'catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms', with peer.service catalog-service. The invocation was well formed, so this is not an Invalid Invocation. The later inability to answer is downstream of the unresolved timeout.
